children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: 
 Expected status code: 201, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
Verify that the POST Create API for different vaccine types
Flu event is created and updated twice and read request fetch the latest version and Etag
Flu event is created and updated twice and search request fetch the latest meta version and Etag
Verify that update will be successful when request is triggered by other supplier with authorize permission
Scenario Outline name: Verify that the Update API will be fails if occurrenceDateTime has future or invalid formatted date

AssertionError: Expected status code 204, but got 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization/7607dedd-5fd6-47f9-806b-67c84a617078', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
assert 404 == 204
 +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
 +    where <Response [404]> = <utilities.context.ScenarioContext object at 0x7f6dbbf10750>.response
Verify that the POST Create API for different vaccine types

AssertionError: 
 Expected status code: 400, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
Verify that the POST Create API will fail if patient surname is invalid
Verify that Search API will throw error if NHS Number is invalid
Verify that Search API will throw error if both different combination of dates and include is invalid
